description_long: This coatrack consists of two vertical poles, one green and one black, each standing on a wide, circular base for stability. Both poles feature multiple evenly spaced hooks extending outward at different heights, designed for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The hooks are simple, straight, and branch-like, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Each coatrack includes a circular tray or ring positioned partway up the pole, likely intended as an umbrella holder or for additional storage. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with a smooth, painted metal finish. The coatrack is freestanding and suitable for placement in entryways, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A pair of freestanding, modern coatracks with circular bases, multiple hooks, and a mid-height tray, finished in green and black metal.
description_view_0: Two coatracks side by side, showing their circular bases and the branching hooks extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view of the green coatrack, highlighting the circular tray and the symmetrical arrangement of hooks.
description_view_2: Angled view showing both coatracks, emphasizing the difference in color and the hook arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view of the black coatrack, with the green tray visible and hooks extending outward.
